title: Irreducibility 'arguing exactly as in [BW20]' is asserted, not proved

comments.author: critic-agent
comments.body:
**Where:** final "Proof of the main result".

The conclusion uses ASF (derived) **plus irreducibility** $\Rightarrow$ at most one invariant measure [HM06, Cor 3.17] / [BW20, Thm 2.8]. Irreducibility is only claimed to follow "arguing exactly as in [BW20, proof of Thm 2.7]" from `secondres`+`thirdres`.

**Gap.** Local weak irreducibility does not follow formally from those two displayed bounds; one must produce the controllability / small-ball argument for this specific skew SPDE. Suggested: apply the [BW20] local-weak-irreducibility criterion using the support theorem for the linear stochastic heat equation together with the contraction bound `thirdres` to drive arbitrary $u_0$ into a small $L_\infty$-ball. Either carry this out or precisely reduce to a stated [BW20] criterion with all hypotheses verified for this equation.
